arasake_kiritsuke_shotgun.name: ARASAKE Kiritsuke Shotgun
arasake_kiritsuke_shotgun.summary: Tactical shotgun in Arasake's neon-bone livery. Four-shell tube, recoil it doesn't pretend to manage.

veshrin_hand_cannon.name: Veshrin Hand Cannon
veshrin_hand_cannon.summary: Veshrin Industries surface-mining sidearm. Ugly, simple, never fails to extract a question.

clinic_neural_dart.name: Clinic Neural Dart
clinic_neural_dart.summary: Compressed-air dart unit from a clinic loading bay. Quiet enough to keep secrets, sharp enough to keep them long.

branwen_rivet_gun.name: Branwen Rivet Gun
branwen_rivet_gun.summary: Repurposed shipwright tool. Punches Iron. Punches anything else considerably worse.

coil_archive_blade.name: Coil Archive Blade
coil_archive_blade.summary: Hilt-marked with House Coil's archive sigil. Carrying it openly makes some doors quieter and other doors louder.

clinic_scalpel.name: Clinic Edge
clinic_scalpel.summary: Surgical blade re-handled for street use. Sharper than the conversation that ended with it.

branwen_pry_bar.name: Branwen Pry Bar
branwen_pry_bar.summary: Iron prybar with three generations of Branwen welders' initials scratched into the shaft.

branwen_yards_jacket.name: Branwen Yards Jacket
branwen_yards_jacket.summary: Welder's jacket. Iron-thread liner, scorched cuffs, every pocket holds a different kind of tool.

dock_runner_coat.name: Dock Runner Coat
dock_runner_coat.summary: Long oilcloth, salt-bleached at the cuffs. The hem moves the way a Dock Runner wants their hem to move.

clinic_scrubs.name: Clinic Scrubs
clinic_scrubs.summary: Surgical blues. Worn openly they earn you about thirty seconds of benefit-of-the-doubt; worn sloppily, they earn you a Bureau interview.

bureau_rain_shell.name: Bureau Rain Shell
bureau_rain_shell.summary: Bureau-issue. Spotless. Wearing it is a position even when it isn't a uniform.

halen_coil_lung_filter.name: Halen-Coil Lung Filter
halen_coil_lung_filter.summary: Subdermal pathogen filter. Halen-Coil refuses to install one but they make the parts.

courier_netgear_jack.name: Courier NetGear Jack
courier_netgear_jack.summary: Pilfered officer-tier interface terminal, jury-rigged into a cervical jack. Sometimes it answers something.

veshrin_tendon_weave.name: Veshrin Tendon Weave
veshrin_tendon_weave.summary: Industrial tendon mesh from the surface mining detail. Designed to lift ore. Lifts other things just as well.
